name: Divine Sense
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Uses per long rest: 1 + Charisma modifier
mechanicalSummary: As an action, detect the location and type of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet not behind total cover, and detect any consecrated or desecrated place or object within the same range.

evidence.pointer: Paladin level progression L1: Divine Sense; featureDescriptions entry

notes: Uses tracked as 1 + CHA per long rest per 2014 rules. Currently descriptive-only in app.

name: Lay on Hands
resourceCostSummary: Player chooses how many points to spend (up to pool maximum)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Pool size = paladin level × 5 hit points
mechanicalSummary: Spend points from the pool to heal a creature by touch; alternatively spend 5 points to cure one disease or neutralize one poison affecting the target.

evidence.pointer: Paladin level progression L1: Lay on Hands; featureDescriptions

notes: Pool size scales linearly: 5 HP per paladin level. Condition removal costs a flat 5 HP from the pool.

name: Fighting Style
mechanicalSummary: Choose one Fighting Style option that provides a persistent bonus (e.g., Defense +1 AC, Dueling +2 damage, Great Weapon Fighting reroll, Protection reaction). The choice is permanent once made.

evidence.pointer: Paladin level progression L2: Fighting Style; featureDescriptions

notes: Protection fighting style grants a reaction (impose disadvantage when ally within 5 ft is attacked). This is a separate capability row.
Current app: descriptive-only, no choice UI.

name: Spellcasting (Paladin)
resourceCostSummary: Expends a spell slot of the spell's level or higher
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Half-caster slot progression starting at L2, up to 5th-level slots
mechanicalSummary: Prepare and cast paladin spells using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. Spell slots follow half-caster progression (rounding down).
notes: Paladin spellcasting is prepared (PREPARED_CASTERS set). No cantrips. Spell slots start at L2.
Actual spell casting is tracked via the universal Cast a Spell entry; this records the class-specific access.

name: Divine Smite
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
resourceCostSummary: Expends one spell slot; damage scales with slot level (2d8 base + 1d8 per slot level above 1st, max 5d8 or 6d8 vs undead/fiends)
rechargeSummary: Spell slots recharge on long rest
scalingSummary: Base 2d8 radiant; +1d8 per spell level above 1st (max 5d8); +1d8 vs undead/fiends
mechanicalSummary: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, you can choose to expend a spell slot to deal additional radiant damage. This is not an action — it's a decision made after the attack hits.

evidence.pointer: Paladin L2: Divine Smite; featureDescriptions; combat action 'Divine smite'

notes: Classified as triggered/rider, NOT an action. The app currently lists it as a combat action which is a UI simplification.
Improved Divine Smite at L11 adds 1d8 radiant to all melee weapon hits without expending slots (separate row).

name: Divine Health
mechanicalSummary: You are immune to disease.
notes: Pure passive immunity.

name: Extra Attack
mechanicalSummary: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
notes: Passively modifies the universal Attack action. Does not stack with Extra Attack from other classes (per 2014 multiclass rules).

name: Aura of Protection
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: Whenever you or a friendly creature within 10 feet of you must make a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus equal to your Charisma modifier. You must be conscious to grant this bonus.

evidence.pointer: Paladin L6: Aura of Protection; featureDescriptions

notes: Passive aura; always active while conscious. Range 10 ft until L18, then 30 ft.

name: Aura of Courage
mechanicalSummary: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be frightened while you are conscious.

evidence.pointer: Paladin L10: Aura of Courage; featureDescriptions

notes: Passive aura; always active while conscious. Range extends to 30 ft at L18.

name: Improved Divine Smite
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
mechanicalSummary: Whenever you hit a creature with a melee weapon, the creature takes an extra 1d8 radiant damage. This stacks with Divine Smite.

evidence.pointer: Paladin L11: Improved Divine Smite; featureDescriptions

notes: Automatic rider on all melee weapon hits. No resource cost. Stacks with Divine Smite.

name: Cleansing Touch
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Uses per long rest = Charisma modifier (min 1)
mechanicalSummary: Use an action to end one spell on yourself or one willing creature you touch. Uses per long rest equal to Charisma modifier.
notes: Ends one spell, not a general condition removal like Lay on Hands.

name: Channel Divinity
rechargeSummary: Short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Shared resource pool powering oath-specific CD options. Paladin gains access at L3 via Sacred Oath; each oath provides distinct CD options (see subclass rows).

evidence.pointer: Paladin L3 progression includes Sacred Oath which grants CD; no explicit CD in paladin level progression
Each paladin subclass has Channel Divinity feature at L3

notes: Paladin CD uses are per short or long rest (1/rest). Not to be confused with Cleric CD which scales uses.

name: Sacred Weapon (Oath of Devotion)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using Channel Divinity, imbue one held weapon with positive energy. For 1 minute, add Charisma modifier to attack rolls (min +1). Weapon emits bright light 20 ft, dim light 20 ft.

name: Turn the Unholy (Oath of Devotion)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using Channel Divinity, present holy symbol; each fiend or undead within 30 ft that can see or hear you makes a Wisdom save. On failure, turned for 1 minute or until taking damage.

name: Aura of Devotion (Oath of Devotion)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft can't be charmed while you are conscious.

name: Purity of Spirit (Oath of Devotion)
mechanicalSummary: You are always under the effects of a protection from evil and good spell.
notes: Permanent spell effect — no action required.

name: Holy Nimbus (Oath of Devotion)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, emanate an aura of sunlight for 1 minute. Bright light 30 ft, dim light 30 ft beyond. Enemy creatures starting their turn in bright light take 10 radiant damage. Advantage on saves vs fiend/undead spells.

name: Nature's Wrath (Oath of the Ancients)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using Channel Divinity, spectral vines ensnare a creature within 10 ft. Target chooses Strength or Dexterity save; on failure, restrained. Save repeats each turn.

name: Turn the Faithless (Oath of the Ancients)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using Channel Divinity, utter ancient words; each fey or fiend within 30 ft makes Wisdom save. On failure, turned for 1 minute or until taking damage.

name: Aura of Warding (Oath of the Ancients)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft have resistance to damage from spells.

name: Undying Sentinel (Oath of the Ancients)
trigger: When reduced to 0 hit points and not killed outright
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: When reduced to 0 HP and not killed outright, you can choose to drop to 1 HP instead. Also immune to magical aging and ignore old age penalties.
notes: Once per long rest.

name: Elder Champion (Oath of the Ancients)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, transform for 1 minute: regain 10 HP at start of each turn, cast paladin spells with bonus action casting time as if they were a bonus action, enemies within 10 ft have disadvantage on saves vs your paladin spells and CD options.

name: Abjure Enemy (Oath of Vengeance)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using Channel Divinity, one creature within 60 ft makes Wisdom save or be frightened (speed 0). Fiends/undead have disadvantage.

name: Vow of Enmity (Oath of Vengeance)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action using Channel Divinity, utter a vow against a creature within 10 ft. Gain advantage on attack rolls against that creature for 1 minute or until it drops to 0 HP.
notes: No subsequent saving throws — advantage lasts full minute or until target drops.

name: Relentless Avenger (Oath of Vengeance)
trigger: When you hit a creature with an opportunity attack
mechanicalSummary: When you hit with an opportunity attack, you can move up to half your speed as part of the same reaction without provoking opportunity attacks.
notes: Rider on opportunity attack reaction.

name: Soul of Vengeance (Oath of Vengeance)
trigger: When a creature under your Vow of Enmity makes an attack
mechanicalSummary: Use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against a creature under your Vow of Enmity when it makes an attack, if it is within range.
notes: Reaction; requires active Vow of Enmity on the target.

name: Avenging Angel (Oath of Vengeance)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, transform for 1 hour: fly speed 60 ft, aura of menace 30 ft (enemies make Wis save or be frightened for 1 minute on entering or starting turn).

name: Control Undead (Oathbreaker)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using CD, target one undead within 30 ft. Wisdom save or obey commands for 24 hours. Undead with CR ≥ paladin level are immune.

name: Dreadful Aspect (Oathbreaker)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft makes Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.

name: Aura of Hate (Oathbreaker)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: Paladin and any fiends/undead within 10 ft gain bonus to melee weapon damage equal to Charisma modifier (min +1).
notes: Note: also buffs enemy fiends/undead within the aura.

name: Supernatural Resistance (Oathbreaker)
mechanicalSummary: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.

name: Dread Lord (Oathbreaker)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, surround yourself with an aura of gloom for 1 minute. Enemies frightened by you that start their turn in the aura take 4d10 psychic damage. Paladin and chosen creatures in aura are draped in deeper shadow.

name: Conquering Presence (Oath of Conquest)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft makes Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute. Save repeats each turn.

name: Guided Strike (Oath of Conquest)
trigger: When you make an attack roll (after seeing the roll, before DM says hit/miss)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use Channel Divinity to gain +10 to an attack roll. Decision made after seeing the d20 roll but before the DM declares hit/miss.
notes: Reactive CD use — not an action proper but classified as special due to being a Channel Divinity option that modifies a roll.

name: Aura of Conquest (Oath of Conquest)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: Creatures frightened of you have speed 0 while in aura. A frightened creature that starts its turn in the aura takes psychic damage equal to half your paladin level.

name: Scornful Rebuke (Oath of Conquest)
trigger: When a creature hits you with an attack
mechanicalSummary: Whenever a creature hits you with an attack, it takes psychic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1), if you are not incapacitated.
notes: Automatic trigger — no action or reaction required.

name: Invincible Conqueror (Oath of Conquest)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, become an avatar of conquest for 1 minute: resistance to all damage, one additional attack as part of Attack action, critical hit range 19-20.

name: Emissary of Peace (Oath of Redemption)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action using CD, gain +5 bonus to Charisma (Persuasion) checks for 10 minutes.

name: Rebuke the Violent (Oath of Redemption)
trigger: Immediately after an attacker within 30 ft deals damage to a creature other than you
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use your reaction and CD to force the attacker to make a Wisdom save. On failure, attacker takes radiant damage equal to the damage it just dealt.

name: Aura of the Guardian (Oath of Redemption)
trigger: When a creature within 10 ft takes damage
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost; paladin takes the damage instead
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: Use your reaction to magically take the damage instead of the original target. Cannot be reduced or prevented. Only transfers damage, not other effects.

evidence.pointer: oath-of-redemption L7: Aura of the Guardian

notes: Reaction — 1/round. Damage cannot be reduced in any way.

name: Protective Spirit (Oath of Redemption)
trigger: At the end of each of your turns in combat, if you are below half HP and not incapacitated
rechargeSummary: Per turn
scalingSummary: 1d6 + half paladin level HP regained per turn
mechanicalSummary: If you end your turn in combat with fewer than half your HP and are not incapacitated, regain 1d6 + half your paladin level HP.
notes: Automatic at end of turn — no action required.

name: Emissary of Redemption (Oath of Redemption)
mechanicalSummary: Always-on: resistance to all damage dealt by other creatures. When a creature hits you, it takes radiant damage equal to half the damage you take.
notes: Permanent passive — always active.

name: Peerless Athlete (Oath of Glory)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action using CD, for 10 minutes: advantage on Athletics/Acrobatics, double carry capacity, +10 ft to long/high jump distance.

name: Inspiring Smite (Oath of Glory)
trigger: Immediately after dealing damage with Divine Smite
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Temp HP = 2d8 + paladin level, distributed among chosen creatures
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action after dealing Divine Smite damage, use CD to distribute 2d8 + paladin level temporary HP among creatures of your choice within 30 ft.
notes: Requires Divine Smite first (rider on smite).

name: Aura of Alacrity (Oath of Glory)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 10 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: Your walking speed increases by 10 ft. Allies who start their turn within 5 ft of you have walking speed increased by 10 ft until end of their turn.
notes: Self speed bonus is always-on. Ally bonus applies at start of their turn within 5 ft.

name: Glorious Defense (Oath of Glory)
trigger: When you or a creature within 10 ft is hit by an attack roll
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to grant bonus to AC equal to Charisma modifier, potentially causing the attack to miss. If the attack misses, you can make one weapon attack against the attacker as part of the same reaction.
notes: Reaction with limited uses per long rest.

name: Living Legend (Oath of Glory)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, gain for 1 minute: advantage on Charisma checks, once per turn turn a missed weapon attack into a hit, use reaction to reroll a failed saving throw.
notes: Includes reactive save reroll (reaction).

name: Abjure the Extraplanar (Oath of the Watchers)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using CD, each aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend within 30 ft makes Wisdom save. On failure, turned for 1 minute or until taking damage.

name: Watcher's Will (Oath of the Watchers)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action using CD, choose up to Charisma modifier creatures within 30 ft. For 1 minute, chosen creatures have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

name: Aura of the Sentinel (Oath of the Watchers)
scalingSummary: Range increases to 30 ft at L18
mechanicalSummary: When you and chosen creatures within 10 ft roll initiative, gain a bonus to initiative equal to your proficiency bonus.

evidence.pointer: oath-of-the-watchers L7: Aura of the Sentinel

notes: Passive aura; applies at initiative roll.

name: Vigilant Rebuke (Oath of the Watchers)
trigger: When you or a creature within 30 ft succeeds on an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to deal 2d8 + Charisma modifier force damage to the creature that forced the saving throw.
notes: Reaction; unlimited uses (only limited by 1 reaction per round).

name: Mortal Bulwark (Oath of the Watchers)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, for 1 minute: truesight 120 ft, advantage on attacks vs aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends, when hitting such a creature can force Charisma save or banish to native plane.

name: Champion Challenge (Oath of the Crown)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft makes Wisdom save. On failure, can't willingly move more than 30 ft away from you.

name: Turn the Tide (Oath of the Crown)
rechargeSummary: Channel Divinity recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action using CD, each chosen creature within 30 ft that can hear you and has no more than half HP regains 1d6 + Charisma modifier HP.

name: Divine Allegiance (Oath of the Crown)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft takes damage
resourceCostSummary: Paladin takes the damage instead; cannot be reduced or prevented
mechanicalSummary: Use your reaction to take the damage instead of the target. The damage cannot be reduced or prevented.
notes: Similar to Redemption's Aura of the Guardian but shorter range (5 ft vs 10 ft).

name: Unyielding Spirit (Oath of the Crown)
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on saving throws against being paralyzed or stunned.

name: Exalted Champion (Oath of the Crown)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, for 1 hour: resistance to B/P/S from nonmagical weapons, allies within 30 ft have advantage on death saves, advantage on Wisdom saves.
